title: 1H-FID-MRSI Live Demonstration at 14.1T
author: Cudalbu, Cristina
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0

steps.instruction: Live demos of 1H-FID-MRSI- acquisitions at 14.1T by MRS4Brain research group @ CIBM MRI EPFL AIT. Two live demos recorded directly on our 14.1T scanner containing the protocol used to acquired FID-MRSI data sets, including the imaging performed before the FID-MRSI acquisitions. The protocol used to acquired in vivo macromolecules with FID-MRSI is also presented in the video from 22/02/2024. Please open the videos with VLC media player. Please cite the following article if you are using the protocol and sequence described herein “Fast high-resolution metabolite mapping in the rat brain using 1 H-FID-MRSI at 14.1T” Dunja Simicic, Brayan Alves, Jessie Mosso, Guillaume Briand, Thanh Phong Lê, Ruud B. van Heeswijk, Jana Starčuková, Bernard Lanz, Antoine Klauser, Bernhard Strasser, Wolfgang Bogner, Cristina Cudalbu under review in NMR in Biomed
